# Shared exclude list for the three onboarder workflows:
#   .github/workflows/catalog-onboard.yml
#   .github/workflows/techdocs-onboard.yml
#   .github/workflows/apis-onboard.yml
#
# One repo name per line. Lines starting with # are ignored, as are
# blank lines. Names match exactly the repo's `name` field from
# `gh repo list olafkfreund`.
#
# This file ONLY covers ad-hoc per-repo exclusions. Categorical
# exclusions (archived, forks, private) are baked into each workflow's
# discovery step — no need to list those names here.
#
# To re-include a repo: delete its line and re-run the relevant
# onboarder with `-f max_prs=80`.

# === BOT_PAT scope didn't include these on the original fine-grained PAT.
# === If you widen BOT_PAT later, delete these lines to re-attempt.
tshop
3Dcarousel-hyprland
3Dstack-hyrpland
notification-hyrpland
r-hyprconfig
SOW-generator
mcp-internal-wiki
AzBackstageIntegration
ai_team_workshop
ado-tui
thunderbird-mail-ai
ollama-skill-cv-rag
freundcloud
